items.title: Seahawks S Nick Emmanwori underwent ankle surgery but expected back for Week 1
items.summary: The Seahawks announced Monday that they had placed safety Nick Emmanwori on the active/physically unable to perform list.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: McInnes glad of Rangers backing in appeal against ban
